inputs.label: Net Operating Income
inputs.businessContext: Annual net operating income from core business operations, before debt service and taxes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual net operating income from core business operations, before debt service and taxes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temel iş faaliyetlerinden elde edilen yıllık net faaliyet geliri, borç servisi ve vergiler öncesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliches Netto-Betriebseinkommen aus dem Kerngeschäft vor Schuldendienst und Steuern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Résultat net d'exploitation annuel des activités principales, avant service de la dette et impôts.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingreso operativo neto anual de las operaciones comerciales principales, antes del servicio de la deuda e impuestos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: صافي الدخل التشغيلي السنوي من العمليات الأساسية، قبل خدمة الدين والضرائب.

inputs.label: Principal Repayments
inputs.businessContext: Annual principal repayments on all business debts (loans, mortgages, etc.).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual principal repayments on all business debts (loans, mortgages, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm işletme borçlarına (krediler, ipotekler vb.) ilişkin yıllık anapara geri ödemeleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Tilgungszahlungen auf alle Geschäftsschulden (Darlehen, Hypotheken usw.).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Remboursements annuels du principal sur toutes les dettes professionnelles (prêts, hypothèques, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.es: Pagos anuales de principal de todas las deudas comerciales (préstamos, hipotecas, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الأقساط السنوية لأصل الدين على جميع ديون الأعمال (قروض، رهون عقارية، إلخ).

inputs.label: Interest Payments
inputs.businessContext: Annual interest payments on all business debts.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual interest payments on all business debts.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm işletme borçlarına ilişkin yıllık faiz ödemeleri.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Paiements annuels d'intérêts sur toutes les dettes professionnelles.
businessContext_i18n.es: Pagos anuales de intereses de todas las deudas comerciales.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مدفوعات الفائدة السنوية على جميع ديون الأعمال.

inputs.label: Lease Payments
inputs.businessContext: Annual lease payments considered as debt obligations. Enter 0 if none.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual lease payments considered as debt obligations. Enter 0 if none.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Borç yükümlülüğü olarak kabul edilen yıllık kira ödemeleri. Yoksa 0 girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Leasingzahlungen gelten als Schuldenverpflichtungen. Geben Sie 0 ein, falls keine.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Paiements annuels de location considérés comme des obligations de dette. Entrez 0 si aucun.
businessContext_i18n.es: Pagos anuales de arrendamiento considerados como obligaciones de deuda. Ingrese 0 si no aplica.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مدفوعات الإيجار السنوية التي تعتبر التزامات دين. أدخل 0 إذا لم يكن هناك أي منها.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
